content: Self-Refine’s iterative no-training self-feedback framework can be grounded in multiple inconsistent LLM self-reflection perspectives to create a hybrid self-improvement system that fixes both frameworks’ limitations: Self-Refine lacks structured divergent thinking, while multi-perspective self-reflection lacks a lightweight iterative refinement loop that requires no extra training data. This hybrid system lets LLMs first generate conflicting critical perspectives on their initial output, then iteratively revise that output using only internal self-feedback without external supervision or additional training.
